title: The Future
content:
After graduation, Lin Yu and Su Xiaoxiao moved to a new apartment together. It was a small, cozy place, but it was theirs.

They both got jobs - Lin Yu as a software engineer, and Su Xiaoxiao as a teacher.

Life was busy, but they made time for each other.

"Lin Yu," Su Xiaoxiao said, one evening.

"Hmm?"

"Do you remember when we first met?"

Lin Yu smiled. "Yeah. You were bouncing into the apartment with a pile of stuffed animals."

Su Xiaoxiao laughed. "And you looked so surprised!"

Lin Yu nodded. "I was. I didn't know what to expect."

Su Xiaoxiao took his hand. "And now look at us. We're living together, we have jobs, and we're happy."

Lin Yu smiled. "Yeah. We are."

***

One weekend, Lin Yu and Su Xiaoxiao went on a trip to the beach. They walked along the shore, holding hands, and they watched the sunset together.

"Lin Yu," Su Xiaoxiao said, stopping to look at the ocean.

"What?"

"I want to spend the rest of my life with you," Su Xiaoxiao said.

Lin Yu's heart raced. "Me too."

He knelt down, and he pulled out a small box.

"Su Xiaoxiao, will you marry me?"

Su Xiaoxiao's eyes filled with tears. "Yes!"

Lin Yu put the ring on her finger, and they kissed.

***

A year later, Lin Yu and Su Xiaoxiao got married. It was a small wedding, with only their closest friends and family in attendance.

Su Xiaoxiao wore a beautiful white dress, and Lin Yu wore a black suit.

As they stood at the altar, Lin Yu looked at Su Xiaoxiao, and he knew that he had made the best decision of his life.

"I love you, Su Xiaoxiao," Lin Yu said.

"I love you too, Lin Yu," Su Xiaoxiao said.

They kissed, and the crowd cheered.

***

Five years later, Lin Yu and Su Xiaoxiao had a beautiful daughter named Lin Miaomiao.

She was cute and energetic, just like her mother.

"Daddy!" Miaomiao said, running into Lin Yu's arms.

Lin Yu picked her up, smiling. "Hi, sweetie."

Su Xiaoxiao walked into the room, carrying a tray of cookies.

"Dinner's ready!"

Lin Yu put Miaomiao down, and they all walked to the dining table.

As they ate dinner, Lin Yu looked at his family, and he felt a sense of peace.

He had come a long way from the shy college student who had been surprised by his cute roommate.

Now he was married, with a beautiful daughter, and he was happier than he had ever been.

And he knew that it was all because of Su Xiaoxiao.

She had changed his life, and he would always be grateful.

The end... for now.
